creator: jbvb@glamlabs.com
text:
The URI for the PR is:
 
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125495
 
 I appear to be suffering from the same issue on my 7.0 AMD64:
 
 FreeBSD cpq.hsd1.ma.comcast.net. 7.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE #0: Sun 
 Feb 24 10:35:36 UTC 2008 
 root@driscoll.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
 
 cvsup for ports did not fix it.
 
 jbvb
